类的使用
org.apache.dubbo.event.Event

  • 使用Event的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.common.threadpool.event

    org.apache.dubbo.event

    • org.apache.dubbo.common.threadpool.event中Event的使用

      org.apache.dubbo.common.threadpool.event中Event的子类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  ThreadPoolExhaustedEvent
      An Dubbo event when the Dubbo thread pool is exhausted.

    • org.apache.dubbo.config.event中Event的使用

      org.apache.dubbo.config.event中Event的子类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  DubboServiceDestroyedEvent
      An Dubbo event when the Dubbo service is about to be destroyed.
      class  DubboShutdownHookRegisteredEvent
      An event raised when the DubboShutdownHook registered on JVM ShutdownHooks
      class  DubboShutdownHookUnregisteredEvent
      An event raised when the DubboShutdownHook unregistered on JVM ShutdownHooks
      class  ReferenceConfigDestroyedEvent
      The Dubbo service ReferenceConfig destroyed event
      class  ReferenceConfigInitializedEvent
      The Dubbo service ReferenceConfig initialized event
      class  ServiceConfigExportedEvent
      ServiceConfig event post-export
      class  ServiceConfigUnexportedEvent
      ServiceConfig event post-unexport

    • org.apache.dubbo.event中Event的使用

      类型参数类型为Event的org.apache.dubbo.event中的类 
      限定符和类型 接口和说明
      interface  ConditionalEventListener<E extends Event>
      An EventListener extending the the conditional feature that decides some event is handled or not by current listener.
      interface  EventListener<E extends Event>
      The Dubbo Event Listener that is based on Java standard EventListener interface supports the generic Event.
      org.apache.dubbo.event中Event的子类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  GenericEvent<S>
      Generic Dubbo event
      返回变量类型为Event的类型的org.apache.dubbo.event中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static Class<? extends Event> EventListener.findEventType(Class<?> listenerClass)
      Find the type Dubbo event from the specified Dubbo event listener
      static Class<? extends Event> EventListener.findEventType(EventListener<?> listener)
      Find the type Dubbo event from the specified Dubbo event listener
      static Class<? extends Event> EventListener.findEventType(ParameterizedType parameterizedType)
      Find the type Dubbo event from the specified ParameterizedType presents a class of Dubbo event listener
      参数类型为Event的org.apache.dubbo.event中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void EventDispatcher.dispatch(Event event)
      Dispatch a Dubbo event to the registered Dubbo event listeners
      void AbstractEventDispatcher.dispatch(Event event) 
      void GenericEventListener.onEvent(Event event) 

    • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中Event的使用

      org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中Event的子类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  ServiceDiscoveryDestroyedEvent
      An event raised after the Service Discovery destroyed.
      class  ServiceDiscoveryDestroyingEvent
      An event raised when the Service Discovery is destroying.
      class  ServiceDiscoveryEvent
      An abstract Event class for ServiceDiscovery
      class  ServiceDiscoveryExceptionEvent
      An event raised when the Service Discovery met with some exception
      class  ServiceDiscoveryInitializedEvent
      An event raised after the Service Discovery initialized
      class  ServiceDiscoveryInitializingEvent
      An event raised when the Service Discovery is initializing.
      class  ServiceInstanceEvent
      The Dubbo event for an service instance
      class  ServiceInstancePreRegisteredEvent
      An event raised before a service instance registered
      class  ServiceInstancePreUnregisteredEvent
      An event raised before a service instance unregistered
      class  ServiceInstanceRegisteredEvent
      An event raised after a service instance registered
      class  ServiceInstancesChangedEvent
      An event raised after the instances of one service has been changed.
      class  ServiceInstanceUnregisteredEvent
      An event raised after a service instance unregistered
